## Type of change

- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Code follows style guidelines (`black`, `isort`, `flake8`)
- [ ] New functions have docstrings
- [ ] Notebooks have been re-run with clean output (if applicable)
- [ ] Related documentation updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added (if applicable)

## TDA-specific checks

- [ ] Persistence diagram cache keys are deterministic
- [ ] Random seeds are fixed
- [ ] New features are scikit-learn compatible (if applicable)
- [ ] Distance metrics are properly unit-tested
